Announcements

Announcement Regarding the Academic Year Arrangement for December 31, 2025

31
						December

2025

On Wednesday, December 31, 2025, academic activities at our University will conclude at 3:00 PM as part of the end-of-year work arrangement.

Academic activities at our University will resume according to the normal academic calendar starting Friday, January 2, 2026.

For your information.
